name: Warband
description: A mob AI and spawning overhaul where the world fights back with strategy. Mobs spawn in role-based squads (Bruiser, Marksman, Support, Leader) with real tactics: flank, kite, break line of sight, regroup, call backup, investigate last-known positions, retreat when wounded. Difficulty scales by regional player capability (or distance from spawn), grows in the Nether and End, and avoids extra vanilla-difficulty stat scaling. Illagers form five rival factions with named ranks, Warmarshal apex bosses, grudges, bounty hunters, and stronghold garrisons. The Wither and Ender Dragon gain Warband phase abilities.
